headline: Why Is Ziff Davis (ZD) Stock Soaring Today
summary: Shares of digital media company Ziff Davis (NASDAQ:ZD) jumped 65.4% in the afternoon session after it announced an agreement to sell its Connectivity division to Accenture for $1.2 billion in cash.

headline: Accenture Mistral AI Alliance Puts Enterprise GenAI At Center Stage
summary: Accenture (NYSE:ACN) has entered a multi year collaboration with Mistral AI to scale advanced AI in organisations globally. The partners plan to co develop enterprise AI solutions and launch AI focused training and certification programs for clients. The agreement aims to help large companies adopt Mistral AI models within Accenture led transformation projects. Accenture is leaning into AI services at a time when its share price sits at $205.93 and its value score is 6. Over the past year,...

headline: This Media and Internet Stock Soars 73%. It’s Offloading a Big Chunk of Business.
summary: Shares of  Ziff Davis  skyrocketed Tuesday after the digital media and internet company agreed to sell its connectivity business to  Accenture  for $1.2 billion in cash.  Accenture  the IT consulting company, will take over  Ziff Davis’  internet-connectivity platform Ookla, which includes products like Speedtest and Downdetector.  The move will help Accenture’s clients track network performance and safely implement artificial-intelligence technology, the company said.

Accenture  the IT consulting company, will take over  Ziff Davis’  internet-connectivity platform Ookla, which includes products like Speedtest and Downdetector.  The move will help Accenture’s clients track network performance and safely implement artificial-intelligence technology, the company said.

headline: Stocks to Watch Tuesday: MongoDB, Best Buy, Target
summary: ↘️ AST SpaceMobile (ASTS): The space-based cellular-network developer reported mixed quarterly results but said it anticipated revenue growth in 2026. Shares dropped 4% in premarket trading. ↘️ MongoDB (MDB): The database company posted better-than-expected financial results, but gave soft guidance for this quarter, triggering further concerns that artificial intelligence could upend its business.

headline: Thought Leadership for Tomorrow Awards Return for 2026
summary: iResearch Services, a leading global B2B thought leadership agency, has announced that entries are now open for the Thought Leadership for Tomorrow (TLFT) Awards 2026. The awards recognize thought leadership that generates measurable results across the industry's unique 4R framework: Revenue, Relationships, Reputation, and Real-world Impact.
